holdings.infoBox: JPSV is an equity ETF with a total of 107 individual holdings. The top holdings are Insight Enterprises stock at 1.92%, Old National Bancorp at 1.79%, Sanmina at 1.74%, MediaAlpha at 1.73%, and LivaNova at 1.73%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Active Small Cap Value ETF (JPSV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 2000 index. The fund is an actively managed, non-transparent ETF that provides exposure to US small-cap value stocks. The fund utilizes the Natixis/NYSE proxy portfolio model JPSV was launched on Mar 7, 2023 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
